name: CReaToR
description: FANDOM CREATOR is a Web3-based community platform designed to bridge the gap between traditional social media (Web2) and the decentralized economy (Web3). As an official Web3 partner of TikTok, the platform empowers creators and fans through a "Fan-Fi" (Fan + Finance) ecosystem. It leverages NFT technology and utility tokens to protect creator rights, enable decentralized monetization through features like NFT memberships and crowdfunding, and reward fan engagement. By integrating e-commerce and community-driven tools, FANDOM CREATOR aims to establish a transparent and equitable infrastructure for the global creator economy.
